revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Talk:Akanta_Shrine]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Talk:Akanta_Shrine]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Talk:Akanta_Shrine]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Talk:Akanta_Shrine]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 19:49, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Akanta_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Akanta_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
